headerTitle: Forward Deployed Engineering Manager  ·  Agentic Dev Environments  ·  FDE Program Builder  ·  Customer Solutions
intro: Coder is standing up its first Forward Deployed Engineering function — the exact program I have run six times independently across eight industries. Discovery to production handoff, adoption documentation, and team handoff on every engagement.
bullets: FDE program built from zero — six complete engagements: customer discovery, solution architecture, implementation, adoption drive, documented handoff. The program Coder is building is the model already in operation.

Agentic development in production — 14 live Claude endpoints (multi-model routing, MCP, HITL confirm-before-execute), deployed into customer environments. Already the customer profile Coder is trying to enable.
Enterprise onboarding and cloud-native deployment — six non-technical teams operating AI-powered workflows independently post-handoff. Docker, PM2, Nginx, SSH pipelines across every engagement.
matchNotes: Builder role standing up new FDE function — exact model I've run 6x. Agentic dev environment focus is live in my stack. Enterprise onboarding pattern is a direct match. Preferred Terraform = in progress. Strong match on everything material.
